ddls:
CREATE TABLE "markets" (
  "market_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each market */,
  "market_name" TEXT /* Name of the market (e.g., New York-Newark-Jersey City, NY-NJ-PA) */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the market */,
  "region" TEXT /* Region the market belongs to */,
  "city" TEXT /* City the market is located in */,
  "state" TEXT /* State the market is located in */,
  "country" TEXT /* Country the market is located in */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the market was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the market was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("market_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "origination_types" (
  "origination_type_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each origination type */,
  "origination_type_name" TEXT /* Name of the origination type (e.g., FHA, USDA, VA) */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the origination type */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("origination_type_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "originations" (
  "origination_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each origination */,
  "market_id" INTEGER /* ID of the market the origination belongs to */,
  "origination_date" TEXT /* Date of the origination */,
  "total_value" REAL /* Total value of the origination */,
  "average_loan" REAL /* Average loan amount of the origination */,
  "average_fees" REAL /* Average fees of the origination */,
  "average_rate" REAL /* Average interest rate of the origination */,
  "origination_type_id" INTEGER /* ID of the origination type */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the origination was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the origination was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("origination_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_originations_origination_type_id FOREIGN KEY ("origination_type_id") REFERENCES origination_types ("origination_type_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_originations_market_id FOREIGN KEY ("market_id") REFERENCES markets ("market_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "loans" (
  "loan_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each loan */,
  "origination_id" INTEGER /* ID of the origination the loan belongs to */,
  "loan_amount" REAL /* Amount of the loan */,
  "interest_rate" REAL /* Interest rate of the loan */,
  "fees" REAL /* Fees associated with the loan */,
  "loan_term" INTEGER /* Term of the loan (in years) */,
  "loan_type" TEXT /* Type of the loan (e.g., fixed, variable) */,
  "property_type" TEXT /* Type of property (e.g., single-family, condo) */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the loan was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the loan was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("loan_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_loans_origination_id FOREIGN KEY ("origination_id") REFERENCES originations ("origination_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "fees" (
  "fee_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each fee */,
  "loan_id" INTEGER /* ID of the loan the fee belongs to */,
  "fee_type" TEXT /* Type of the fee (e.g., origination, closing) */,
  "fee_amount" REAL /* Amount of the fee */,
  "fee_description" TEXT /* Description of the fee */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the fee was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the fee was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("fee_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_fees_loan_id FOREIGN KEY ("loan_id") REFERENCES loans ("loan_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "interest_rates" (
  "rate_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each interest rate */,
  "loan_id" INTEGER /* ID of the loan the interest rate belongs to */,
  "rate_type" TEXT /* Type of the interest rate (e.g., fixed, variable) */,
  "rate_value" REAL /* Value of the interest rate */,
  "rate_description" TEXT /* Description of the interest rate */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the interest rate was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the interest rate was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("rate_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_interest_rates_loan_id FOREIGN KEY ("loan_id") REFERENCES loans ("loan_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., administrator, analyst) */,
  "password" TEXT /* Password of the user */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the user was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the user was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "user_access" (
  "access_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each access event */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user accessing the origination */,
  "origination_id" INTEGER /* ID of the origination being accessed */,
  "access_date" TEXT /* Date when the origination was accessed */,
  "access_type" TEXT /* Type of access (e.g., view, edit) */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the access event was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the access event was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("access_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_user_access_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_user_access_origination_id FOREIGN KEY ("origination_id") REFERENCES originations ("origination_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "reports" (
  "report_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each report */,
  "origination_id" INTEGER /* ID of the origination the report belongs to */,
  "report_type" TEXT /* Type of the report (e.g., market analysis, trends) */,
  "report_date" TEXT /* Date when the report was generated */,
  "report_data" TEXT /* Data contained in the report */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the report was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the report was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("report_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_reports_origination_id FOREIGN KEY ("origination_id") REFERENCES originations ("origination_id")
)
